responsibilities: Managed paid digital ad campaigns across search and social channels
Optimized search engine optimization (SEO) keyword strategies
Structured target email marketing segments and conversion paths
Analyzed web metrics and campaign ROAS metrics
achievementTemplates: Managed digital campaigns on [Platform], raising ROAS by [Metric] with [Tool].
Optimized SEO copy for [Platform], increasing organic traffic by [Metric].

experienceQuestions.question: Managed campaigns or ad budgets optimizing ROAS?
experienceQuestions.upgradedPoint: Managed multi-channel digital campaigns leveraging Google Ads, achieving a record-high 4.2x ROAS through advanced audience targeting.

experienceQuestions.question: Optimized SEO keywords to drive organic customer acquisitions?
experienceQuestions.upgradedPoint: Executed comprehensive on-page and off-page SEO strategies, driving a 130% YoY growth in organic search traffic.

experienceQuestions.question: Launched targeted email marketing campaigns raising conversions?
experienceQuestions.upgradedPoint: Structured segmented email outreach campaigns, achieving a 26% open rate and raising sales conversion revenue by 19%.

experienceQuestions.question: Orchestrated lead generation campaigns to grow pipelines?
experienceQuestions.upgradedPoint: Identified and qualified 250+ outbound leads via automated cold email workflows, raising customer acquisition pipeline values by 30%.

experienceQuestions.question: Ran customer re-engagement campaigns reducing user churn?
experienceQuestions.upgradedPoint: Designed remarketing paths and customized email copy, lowering user churn by 12%.

experienceQuestions.question: Built analytics metrics audits to identify spend wastage?
experienceQuestions.upgradedPoint: Audited keyword ad groups via Google Analytics, saving $25k in low-performing search terms budget.

projectQuestions.question: Drafted copy or graphic design briefs for paid social ads?
projectQuestions.upgradedPoint: Drafted target copy guidelines and visual briefs for 15 Meta and LinkedIn ad variants, ensuring brand consistency.

projectQuestions.question: Built optimized campaign landing pages in Webflow or WordPress?
projectQuestions.upgradedPoint: Developed landing pages targeting lead actions, optimizing form fields to increase registration signups by 18%.

projectQuestions.question: Configured email automation drip triggers in Mailchimp?
projectQuestions.upgradedPoint: Structured automated email drip funnels, trigger-linked to user signup events to maximize onboarding engagement.

projectQuestions.question: Ran A/B split testing on ad designs or landing pages?
projectQuestions.upgradedPoint: Created and optimized 15 creative variants for split testing, driving a 24% increase in click-through rates (CTR).

projectQuestions.question: Executed technical SEO crawl audits using Screaming Frog?
projectQuestions.upgradedPoint: Conducted index audits using Screaming Frog, identifying index crawl blockers to boost site visibility.

projectQuestions.question: Configured Google Tag Manager pixels or event tracking?
projectQuestions.upgradedPoint: Configured GTM pixels and custom event triggers to map customer checkout conversion paths.
